query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "representation forcing for bottleneck-free unified multimodal models" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as a foundational survey and canonical reference for the domain of "Unified Multimodal Models," which is the explicit subject of the user's follow-up research. It provides the necessary architectural context (autoregressive vs. diffusion vs. hybrid) and identifies key challenges (tokenization, cross-modal attention) that any work on "Representation Forcing" in this space must cite to establish the state of the art.
